hooks.command: if command -v labby >/dev/null 2>&1; then labby setup plugin-hook --no-repair; else echo 'labby is not installed — install it with: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/jmagar/labby/main/scripts/install.sh | sh  (then run: labby setup)'; fi
if command -v labby >/dev/null 2>&1; then labby setup plugin-hook; else echo 'labby is not installed — plugin settings were NOT synced. Install labby, then run: labby setup'; fi
